snp3.1:1.1: I will praise the Going Forth,
snp3.1:1.2: how he went forth, the One with Eyes,
snp3.1:1.3: how he reasoned and chose the Going Forth.
snp3.1:2.3: while going forth is the open air.”
snp3.1:3.2: he avoided evil deeds in body.
snp3.1:4.1: Then he, the Buddha, went to Rājagaha,
snp3.1:4.2: the mountain fortress of the Magadhans,
snp3.1:5.1: King Bimbisāra, standing in his palace, saw him,
snp3.1:5.3: and on seeing him, consummate in marks,
snp3.1:6.3:
How consummate his demeanor!
Mindful, his eyes downcast,
snp3.1:6.4: looking only a plow-length before him.
snp3.1:7.2: This one’s not like one from a lowly lineage:
snp3.1:7.4: to see where this monk will go.”
snp3.1:8.4: Where will his dwelling place be?”
snp3.1:9.1: As he went from house to house—
snp3.1:10.1: Then he, the sage, completing his alms round,
snp3.1:10.2: left the city, headed for Mount Paṇḍava.
snp3.1:11.1: Seeing him go to his dwelling place,
snp3.1:11.3: while one returned to tell the king.
snp3.1:12.3: sits like a tiger, a bull,
snp3.1:12.4: a lion in a mountain cleft.”
snp3.1:13.3: straight away set out by royal coach,
snp3.1:14.1: Going as far as the coach would go,
snp3.1:14.2: the noble-warrior king got down from the coach,
snp3.1:15.1: Sitting there, he exchanged courteous greetings,
snp3.1:16.2: in the first stage of youth,
snp3.1:17.1: You would look glorious in the vanguard of an army,
snp3.1:17.3:
I offer you wealth :
Enjoy it.
snp3.1:17.4:
I ask your birth :
Inform me.”
snp3.1:18.2: by the foothills of the Himalayas,
snp3.1:18.3: is a country consummate in energy & wealth,
snp3.1:19.3: From that lineage I have gone forth,
snp3.1:19.4: but not in hope of sensuality.
